0.text: Indistinct ground-glass opacity in the basal segments of both lower lobes

1.text: Mild diffuse ectasia, more prominent centrally in both lungs

2.text: Linear areas of density increase consistent with atelectasis in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Linear areas of density increase consistent with atelectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in the right upper lobe
